subject: Chore: Adding python3-ncclient for 20.04
commit_message:
Chore: Adding python3-ncclient for 20.04

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33

Signed-off-by: Bengt Thuree <bthuree@linuxfoundation.org>
Change-Id: I42197163bddfe2f214b62584ed082052dc17dfc0

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This needs testing.. since last time this package was not found in 20.04

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> This needs testing.. since last time this package was not found in 20.04

The package that was not found was python-ncclient, has been renamed to python3-ncclient
Or we are uncertain if python3-ncclient is fully backwards compatible with python-ncclient?
Change has been successfully merged by Jessica Wagantall
